title: Closed batch 15 pending-graduations curation
body: Batch 15 closed in place: 5 legacy backlog entries processed as 2 duplicate and 3 owner-gated. Updated pending-graduations ledger/source statuses, repo-continuity, and agentic thread record; next batch starts at rule visibility under friction, comms correlation gap, stance-staleness, PR-87 security review, and small-work bypass. Validation passed: targeted markdownlint, git diff --check, collaboration-state check, and practice:fitness:strict-hard SOFT with 20 soft, 24 healthy, 7 ready empty, 0 hard, 0 critical. Claim 573756c3-f790-445b-87ae-50423e825759 closed.
